since_last: 66% of 101 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +1.72%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 66% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.05% · BTC +1.16% · Gold -0.08% · Nasdaq100 +0.47%. 66% of 101 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +1.72%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +1.72%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at +0.18%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: BABA is the standout at +5.20%
cards.body: Leaders: BABA +5.20%, MDB +4.90%, PUBM +4.52%, MRVL +4.36%, TER +4.35%. Laggards: CRNC -2.78%, DELL -2.40%, ORCL -2.37%, TSLA -2.36%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.32% at $122.36
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.32% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
